testcase.name: test_get_habits_list

failure.message: assert False + where False = isinstance({'completions_today': ['99306d6a-5ac8-4d24-98ed-542aefcabcfd'], 'date': '2026-02-16', 'gate_unlocked': True, 'habits': [{'action_data': "Hey! I've been using this amazing trading platform called CrossCurrent. It's helped me track my profits and stay disciplined. Want to check it out?", 'action_type': 'send_invite', 'active': True, 'created_at': '2026-02-16T11:17:45.255315+00:00', ...}], ...}, list)

I've been using this amazing trading platform called CrossCurrent. It's helped me track my profits and stay disciplined. Want to check it out?", 'action_type': 'send_invite', 'active': True, 'created_at': '2026-02-16T11:17:45.255315+00:00', ...}], ...}, list)

testcase.name: test_push_subscribe_endpoint_exists

failure.message: AssertionError: Endpoint /api/notifications/subscribe should exist assert 404 != 404 + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration_106_p0_verification.py:108: in test_push_subscribe_endpoint_exists assert response.status_code != 404, "Endpoint /api/notifications/subscribe should exist" E AssertionError: Endpoint /api/notifications/subscribe should exist E assert 404 != 404 E + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code
